div.head: 5. Memorandum of Telephone Conversation Between Secretary of State Herter and President EisenhowerSource: Eisenhower Library, Herter Papers, Telephone Conversations. No classification marking.
div.p: The President telephoned that if the Cubans attack Guantanamo, they would be kicked out with force. The Secretary said our Legal AdviserEric Hager. was doing what he was supposed to do in looking into it. He said we would move right along on this. The President said they were waiting for the other paperNot further identified. and the Secretary said it was on its way.
